<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add antfu/skills --skill vite --skill slidev -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/slidev`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed compose-external-wave-12 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/slidev.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run external-skill-auditor before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Official vendored skill for Slidev - presentation slides for developers. From slidevjs/slidev. Provides guidance on creating developer-focused slides/presentations using the Slidev tool (Markdown-based, Vite-powered). Part of antfu skills collection for Vite ecosystem tooling.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add antfu/skills --skill vite --skill slidev -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.
